/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pipeline_tests.dir/tests/test_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_tests.dir/tests/test_async_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_tests.dir/tests/test_parallel_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_tests.dir/tests/test_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeline_tests.dir/tests/test_new_features.cpp.o -o pipeline_tests  _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
